Torn, Burnt Book  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE
Torn, Burnt Book
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE

Item Lore:Right half of the book of scale
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 01:45:03
Page Updated:Sat Apr 22nd, 2023

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Nagafen's Lair
NPC Name
Lord Nagafen

Skyfire Mountains
NPC Name
Talendor

The Emerald Jungle
NPC Name
Severilous

The Western Wastes
NPC Name
Melalafen

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Plane of Sky
Quest Name
The Fiery Avenger

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Nagafen's Lair
Skyfire Mountains
The Emerald Jungle
The Western Wastes


Uploaded April 12th, 2025 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
amazing
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2012 at 5:43 AM Rating: Decent
Shuraz
Sage
1,086 posts
All the times I killed severillious i never got one of these to drop. but it did today! a burnt book from sev. keep the faith!
▲ Page top
Severilous dead, dropped two torn books
QuoteReply
# Nov 17 2007 at 1:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592778898325
7 posts
Dropped two today, i could not believe it. this is eighth time he has been killed in my presence and he finally drops it (X 2). Thanks to Gaggrog and Pamilu (Legacy of the Ravens) for their help.
▲ Page top
WOOT!
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2007 at 9:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343967713
138 posts
Just looted this from Talendor on Stromm, Jan 10th at 9:25 AM mountain time. ;)

Having participated in taking down Tal twice and Sev once, I was convinced that I would NOT get my drop unless I was allowed to get the kill tag (which I hadn't previously)... so I asked my friends to stop attacking once he hit 1%. They actually stopped at 10% and let me take him down. Was a good time.

The book was sitting there waiting for me on the 6th loot slot.

Many much happiness.
▲ Page top
Ugh
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2006 at 6:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591924964249
1 post
51 Sev kills and still no burnt book.. epic 1.0 is taking 3+ years so far for me :D
▲ Page top
rare drop
QuoteReply
# Nov 17 2006 at 8:43 AM Rating: Decent
rdahl
80 posts
killed 4 of the cold dragons (Faydedar and Gorenaire) and had 5 torn frost covered books drop (yes that's right 4 kills, 5 book). killed 6 of the fire dragons (Severilous and Talendor) and had 1 torn burnt book drop. apparently the burnt book is a rare drop but the frost book is common.
▲ Page top
Killed
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2006 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802020660
22 posts
Killed him last week on Xegony server. Zoned into EJ and was surprised to see him up. Was amazed when he dropped 2 burnt books, 4 spells, green scale, and treasure hunters satchel. Either we were extremely lucky or they finally made the books drop more because the drop rate was ridiculously low.
▲ Page top
Soloed 70 Mage 7th Hammer Lanys

Killed him tonight dropped torn burnt book green dragon scales 4 spells invert gravity, word of redemption banishment of shadows Gift of pure thought Kavrulls magic pouch.

This dropped for us tonight 7/24/05 - 18 members in the raid.

One in Two
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2005 at 3:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613953146405
View User Forum
42 posts
Killed Severilous and Talendor within an hour of each other for me and another pally. We both have the frost covered book he won the roll on Sev's book and Tale did not drop one. But he has some kills done for the 1.5 prequest so he may MQ it. But 2 lvl 70 ep geared pallys should be able to duo either we had a few others who helped but it would have been doable.

Severivous

Drops from Severilous. I'm looking in it's corpse right now and it has the book.

Pally epic
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2004 at 9:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797878176
Guru
346 posts
I don't actually think this drops of Nag when higher levels kill him, i started my epic rather late and have seen from informatin below(thanx btw) & from others on my server the Sev is the best hope, some other classes on the server have one from killing it but no pally in group, that is mainly due to them being MQable. Or unless ofcourse your on FV then go simply buy it.

Edited, Thu Mar 25 11:39:15 2004

Pally epic
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2012 at 10:15 PM Rating: Decent
fronglo
Scholar
4,445 posts
Steinhound wrote:
I don't actually think this drops of Nag when higher levels kill him, i started my epic rather late and have seen from informatin below(thanx btw) & from others on my server the Sev is the best hope, some other classes on the server have one from killing it but no pally in group, that is mainly due to them being MQable. Or unless ofcourse your on FV then go simply buy it.

Edited, Thu Mar 25 11:39:15 2004


I know this is a very old post but thought Id let ya know I just disproved it. Just killed Naggy with a 52 SK, 52 Zerker, 2 lvl 52 mercs and to boot I had a lvl 76 mage hiding around the corner with the lvl 76 pet attacking dragon. He did in fact drop the book in the 6th loot slot.
____________________________
Hi
▲ Page top
Ragefire
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2003 at 5:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1696810595756
402 posts
Does drop off Ragefire. Not very commonly though.

-Matthyas Lionheart
Crusader of Rodcet Nife
▲ Page top
Drop rate
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2003 at 11:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966060565
7 posts
Not sure about naggy really, in my naggy/vox days i only saw the book drop 1 out of every 4-5 times or so. However, some friends of mine and I were killing Sev a while back and had 3 books drop. We had not one pally there lol. A few of us officers looted them because they can be mq'd. Point is yes after 52 the dragons are higher lvl, but not really harder becuase you will progress and lvl yourself to balance that. I wouldn't suggest to ANYONE to wait at lvl 52 for epic drops, it can be done post 52. In this particular situation make friends with pre-epic warriors. =) I still have that dumb book in my bank taking up space heh.

Aze
60 bard
▲ Page top
I Hate you NAGGY
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2003 at 5:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788219510
31 posts
I decided to go with a few of my friends... well they where healing the low lvls ( some were alts, and they where two boxing ). Needless to say I tell my wife she needs to go to get this damn book, cause I solo'ed sir lucan for her, and she got her soulfire, she got her Ghoulbane, and she was there...Well at the end of the fight ( and 5 wipes ) he decides to take a swim in the lava! Well she made 3 or 4 trips in that lava looking for him, cause the looter didn't call if anything was left... Naggy didn't drop it !!! This book should drop everytime, or at least be common round every other time.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2002 at 12:19 PM Rating: Default

#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 12 2002 at 4:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) read the post under yours and you will see, moron
Torn Burnt Book
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2002 at 8:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756785480
1 post
This is the Nagafen part of the Book of Scale. However, it is a fallacy to say that it is dropped off of "Multiple Creatures" as written here. This leads one to believe that other mobs in Sol B can drop it. The only mob that drops it in Sol B is Nagafen. I've heard Ragefire, but I've never seen it. I've only ever seen it drop off of Nagafen, Talendor, and Severillous.
▲ Page top
RE: Torn Burnt Book
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2002 at 12:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766597950
12 posts
The reason it states that the book is multiple creatures is because Gorenaire drops this also, though neither him or Nagafen are listed here. It's part of the trivial loot code whether Negafen drops this or not. Lv 53+, not a chance.

Best to get this early when the loot code works in your favor. A lot easier than keeling Gore .



Edited, Wed Oct 2 12:48:31 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Torn Burnt Book
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2002 at 6:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781178839
7 posts
No, Gore Dose not drop this Book. Nagafen, Talendor, and Ragefire do. Gore drops the Frozen book.
▲ Page top
Yes
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 6:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761997403
29 posts
Yes this book IS part of the book of scale and yes it IS dropped off of multi mobs. Trust me though, if you exceed lvl 52 without getting this off of naggy, you'll have a much harder time getting this book because it drops off of higher level dragons. There is at least one other one that i know of, Faydedar (sp). He is in the ocean of tears and a guildy of mine saw him drop half a guild in 1 minute and he ate the rest of em as they were running away. Vox' book is the other part of the book of scale and it too drops off of other dragons. Gorenaire in the Dread Lands also drops the torn frozen book, but she is a hell of a lot tougher then Vox.
Hope this helps.

P.S. You can turn in both parts of the book of scale and 1kpp in Qeynos now. Before, you had to take them to Neriak.
▲ Page top
Stonehelm

Is this the Naggy part of the bok of scale? If so is it really droped from mutli. mobs?
